component.name: WeezTerm
component.summary: A GPU-accelerated cross-platform terminal emulator and multiplexer

description.p: WeezTerm is a fork of WezTerm with integrated remote SSH extensions. It is a terminal emulator with support for modern features such as fonts with ligatures, hyperlinks, multiple windows, tabs and split panes.
Configuration is expressed using Lua and many powerful functions are provided to help you customize your terminal to your workflow.
WeezTerm extends WezTerm with VS Code Remote SSH-style features: remote browser opening, automatic port forwarding, and more.
